task_completion.description: The agent opens the docker-compose.yml file in the legacy-app directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, vim) or terminal showing the contents of '/home/ga/legacy-app/docker-compose.yml' being viewed or edited.

task_completion.description: The agent adds a WAF service using the specified modsecurity image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml file contains a new service block (e.g., 'waf:') with 'image: owasp/modsecurity-crs:3-nginx'.

task_completion.description: The agent configures the BACKEND environment variable for the WAF service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml file shows an 'environment:' section under the WAF service containing 'BACKEND' pointing to the app service (e.g., 'BACKEND: http://app:8080' or similar).

task_completion.description: The agent updates port mappings to route traffic through the WAF and remove direct app access.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml file shows the 'ports:' section removed from the 'app' service and added to the WAF service, mapping host port 8080 to the WAF container (e.g., '8080:80' or '8080:8080').

task_completion.description: The agent restarts the docker services and verifies the application is accessible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'docker-compose up' or 'docker compose up' being run, followed by a successful 'curl http://localhost:8080' or a web browser showing the HR dashboard at localhost:8080.

integrity.description: The agent actually saves the modified docker-compose.yml file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the file being saved in an editor, or a subsequent 'cat' command showing the updated contents on disk.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely restarts the docker services to apply changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing docker containers being recreated, started, or updated (e.g., 'Recreating legacy-app_app_1', 'Creating legacy-app_waf_1').

integrity.description: The agent does not mock the verification step.
integrity.visual_evidence: The curl command or browser interaction is genuine and shows actual HTML/UI of the HR dashboard, not a manually echoed text output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application directory is '/home/ga/legacy-app'. The WAF image must be exactly 'owasp/modsecurity-crs:3-nginx'. The target port to remain accessible on the host is 8080.
